metadata.title: privacy-glasses
metadata.description: Provides a button and command to obfuscate onscreen text for better privacy in public settings.

regex.target: name: "隐私眼镜 - 隐藏所有"

regex.source: name: "Privacy Glasses - hide files in folders marked as private"
regex.target: name: "隐私眼镜 - 隐藏标记为私有的文件夹中的文件"

regex.source: name: "Privacy Glasses - reveal headlines only, keeping body content hidden"
regex.target: name: "隐私眼镜 - 只显示标题，隐藏正文内容"

regex.source: name: "Privacy Glasses - do not hide anything"
regex.target: name: "隐私眼镜 - 不隐藏任何东西"
text: "Privacy Glasses v"
text: "https://github.com/jillalberts/privacy-glasses"

regex.source: text: ": documentation, report issues, contact info"
regex.target: text: ": documentation, report issues, contact info"

regex.source: text: 'To activate/deactivate Privacy Glasses, click the glasses icon on the left-hand ribbon or run "Privacy Glasses" commands in the Command Palette (Ctrl-P). The command can also be bound to a keyboard shortcut if you wish.'
regex.target: text: '要激活/禁用隐私眼镜，请单击左侧功能区的眼镜图标，或在命令调板（Ctrl-P）中运行 "隐私眼镜 "命令。或者也可以将该命令绑定到键盘快捷键上。'
.setName("启动时激活隐私眼镜")
.setName("用户不活动后全部隐藏（秒）")
.setName("鼠标悬停时显示")
.setName("在光标下显示")
.setName("模糊程度")
.setName("私人目录")
.setName("私人笔记标记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Indicates whether the plugin is automatically activated when starting Obsidian.")
regex.target: .setDesc("表示启动Obsidian时是否自动激活插件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Inactivity time after which Privacy Glasses will hide all. -1 to disable auto-hiding.")
regex.target: .setDesc("多长时间不活动，隐私眼镜将隐藏所有内容。-1则关闭自动隐藏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Indicates whether or not to reveal content when hovering the cursor over it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("表示是否在光标悬停时显示内容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Indicates whether or not to reveal content when caret is on it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("表示当光标位于内容行时，是否显示内容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Comma-separated list of directories, in which files are considered private")
regex.target: .setDesc("以逗号分隔的目录列表，其中的文件被视为私有文件")

regex.source: .setDesc("Start a note with this text to mark note as private")
regex.target: .setDesc("以此文本开始的笔记，将被标记为私人笔记")
.setPlaceholder("-1")
.setPlaceholder("finance,therapy")
.setPlaceholder("#private")
